title: 2-methyl butyramide as a urine biomarker for Ascaris lumbricoides
author: Lagatie, Ole
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Lagatie, Ole, Ediage, Emmanuel Njumbe, Pikkemaat, Jeroen A., Djuardi, Yenny, Stuyver, Lieven J. (2017): 2-methyl butyramide, a previously identified urine biomarker for Ascaris lumbricoides, is not present in infected Indonesian individuals. Parasites & Vectors (629) 10 (1): 1-3, DOI: 10.1186/s13071-017-2600-z, URL: http://dx.doi.org/10.1186/s13071-017-2600-z
